results.rendered_html:
1. yavya (von 1. yava)
1〉 adj. zu Gerste geeignet  P. 5,1,7 . mit Gerste besäet, — bestanden 2,3 .  AK. 2,9,7 .  H. 967 .  HALĀY. 2,8 .
— 2〉 m. nach  MAH.  Gersten-, Fruchtvorrath  VS. 23,8 ; vgl.  VS. PRĀT. 2,20 .
— 3〉 m. pl. Bez. eines Ṛṣi — Geschlechts: somapā yavyāḥ (somavāyavyāḥ  ed. Bomb. )  MBH. 12,6143 .

results.rendered_html:
yavya a. [yavānāṃ kṣetraṃ yava-yat]
1 Sown with or consisting of barley.
2 Suitable or fit for barley.
— vyaḥ A month.
— vyaṃ A field of barley.
